question.text: When was the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority (PFRDA) established?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** PFRDA was established on September 18, 2013, in accordance with the provisions of the Pension Fund Regulatory and Development Authority Act, 2013, with responsibilities to promote old age income security and regulate pension funds. **The Trap:** While NPS was available before 2013, PFRDA itself was formally established as a statutory body in 2013. The 2004 date relates to FIU-IND, not PFRDA. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** PFRDA regulates NPS which is mandatory for new Central Government recruits (except armed forces) and available voluntarily for all citizens.
